meaning: 卡拉布里亚区[意大利行政区名]
examples: Amongst the knife styles we should mention the styles of Rome, Neaples, Salerno, Calabria and Corsica.
As an Italian family name Paparazzo is said to be common in Calabria.
Rosarno is in Calabria, the toe of Italy, a lawless place at the best of times.
Calabria remains the epicenter of production, and the cosmetics and tea industries are the primary customers.
But the atmosphere was marred by the assassination of the deputy governor of the Calabria region.
